weather.headline: Extreme Heat Warning issued June 22 at 12:15PM MST until June 24 at 8:00PM MST by NWS Tucson AZ
weather.areaDesc: Tucson Metro Area including Tucson/Green Valley/Marana/Vail; Southeast Pinal County including Kearny/Mammoth/Oracle; Upper San Pedro River Valley including Sierra Vista/Benson; Upper Gila River and Aravaipa Valleys including Clifton/Safford
